title: scytalia informis
side_effects: Scytalia informis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In extreme cases, scytalia informis can cause cardiac problems, including rapid heartbeat and arrhythmias, especially in individuals with pre-existing heart conditions. If ingested in large quantities, the plant may also cause renal failure due to its toxic compounds.
